title: United States Application for a U.S. Passport for Eligible Individuals — Correction, Name Change, and Limited Passport Replacement (Form DS-5504)
description: Reapply for a U.S. passport book and/or card, using the data model of Form DS-5504 (Application for a U.S. Passport for Eligible Individuals — Correction, Name Change to Passport Issued 1 Year or Less, and Limited Passport Replacement). There is no fee to use this form unless expedited or 1-2 Day Delivery service is requested for a name change or limited passport replacement; a data or printing error is corrected at no cost. This form is submitted by mail together with the applicant's most recently issued U.S. passport book and/or card, one color photograph, and supporting evidence, to the National Passport Processing Center. Eligible only for an applicant who can answer 'Yes' to at least one of three statements (see the eligibility fields): a name change by marriage or court order less than one year after the passport was issued, where the passport itself is also less than one year old; identifying information printed incorrectly in the current passport; or a passport book obtained at the full fee and limited to two years or less for a reason other than multiple losses or serious damage/mutilation. An applicant who cannot answer 'Yes' to any of these, or whose passport has been lost, stolen, mutilated, or damaged, must instead use us/dos/passport-application-ds11. This document completes the U.S. Department of State passport form family alongside us/dos/passport-application-ds11 (first-time application or full replacement), us/dos/passport-renewal-ds82 (routine mail-in renewal), and us/dos/lost-or-stolen-passport-ds64 (lost/stolen report, commonly filed together with DS-11). It does not submit the application; the live U.S. Department of State source is always authoritative (see VERIFICATION.md).

authority.name: U.S. Department of State, Bureau of Consular Affairs

verification.notes: Source-derived reference schema transcribed field-by-field from two independent sources: the live 'Change or Correct a Passport' page at travel.state.gov, and the live fillable Form DS-5504 PDF at eforms.state.gov/Forms/ds5504_pdf.PDF ('DS-5504 04-2025', OMB expiration 06/30/2028), fetched directly with no access block, consistent with the sibling DS-11/DS-82/DS-64 documents in this registry. Extracted two independent ways: page text via pdfjs-dist's getTextContent() (6 pages: 4 instruction pages + 2 application pages), and the AcroForm field structure via pdf-lib's form-field API (79 named widgets), cross-checked against each other and against widget page/position to resolve fields the printed instructions do not itemize (e.g. the Permanent Address block, and the Additional Contact Phone Numbers pair). Status remains 'draft' pending a full independent second-reviewer pass. See VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: nameChangedWithinOneYear
fields.label: Did you change your name, by marriage or court order, less than one year after your most recent U.S. passport book and/or card was issued, and was that passport book and/or card issued less than one year ago?
fields.description: One of three eligibility statements for this form (Section A) — an applicant must be able to answer 'Yes' to at least one. If 'Yes', complete changedNameLast/First/Middle. If you cannot answer 'Yes' to any of the three eligibility statements, you cannot use this form; use us/dos/passport-application-ds11 or us/dos/passport-renewal-ds82 instead.
fields.sourceRef: Instruction Page 1, Section A, eligibility statement 1; echoed as Application Page 2 item 20 ('Has your name changed by marriage or court order less than one year after your U.S. passport book and/or card was issued?')

fields.name: identifyingInfoPrintedIncorrectly
fields.label: Was your identifying information printed incorrectly in your most recent U.S. passport book and/or card?
fields.description: One of three eligibility statements for this form (Section A) — an applicant must be able to answer 'Yes' to at least one. If 'Yes', also indicate which field(s) need correcting (misprintedLastName etc.) and their corrected values. Covers a data error (e.g. name, sex marker, place of birth) or a printing error (e.g. missing data, discoloration, crooked printing).
fields.sourceRef: Instruction Page 1, Section A, eligibility statement 2; echoed as Application Page 2 item 22 ('Was your identifying information printed incorrectly in your U.S. passport book and/or card?')

fields.name: passportLimitedForOtherReason
fields.label: Was your most recent U.S. passport book obtained at the full passport fee and limited to two years or less, for a reason other than multiple losses or serious damage/mutilation of previous passports?
fields.description: One of three eligibility statements for this form (Section A) — an applicant must be able to answer 'Yes' to at least one. If 'Yes', you must also submit evidence of U.S. citizenship and/or identity (see the description of the passport book/card fields). Passport books limited in validity due to serious damage or multiple losses cannot be extended and are not eligible via this statement.
fields.sourceRef: Instruction Page 1, Section A, eligibility statement 3; echoed as Application Page 2 item 23 ('Was your most recent U.S. passport book limited for two years or less?')

fields.name: nameOnMostRecentPassport
fields.label: Your name as printed on your most recent U.S. passport book and/or passport card
fields.description: The name currently on file with the U.S. Department of State, used to identify which passport this application concerns. Distinct from requestedNameLast/First/Middle, which is the name to appear on the new passport.

fields.name: requestedNameLast
fields.label: Name — Last
fields.description: Item 1: the name to appear in the new passport. If different from nameOnMostRecentPassport, submit proof of name change (marriage certificate, divorce decree, or court order of name change) if resulting from marriage or legal name change.
fields.sourceRef: Instruction Page 2, Section C, item 1 ('Name (Last, First, Middle): Enter the name to appear in the passport.')

fields.name: requestedNameFirst
fields.label: Name — First
fields.description: Item 1: the name to appear in the new passport.

fields.name: requestedNameMiddle
fields.label: Name — Middle
fields.description: Item 1: the name to appear in the new passport.

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of birth
fields.description: Item 2. YYYY-MM-DD; the source form uses MM/DD/YYYY.
fields.sourceRef: Instruction Page 2, Section C, item 2 ('Date of Birth: Use the following format: Month, Date, and Year (MM/DD/YYYY).')

fields.name: sexMarker
fields.label: Sex
fields.description: Item 3. You must select the sex marker option that corresponds with your biological sex at birth.
fields.sourceRef: Instruction Page 2, Section C, item 3 ('Sex: You must select sex marker option "M" (male) or "F" (female) that corresponds with your biological sex at birth.')

fields.name: placeOfBirth
fields.label: Place of birth
fields.description: Item 4: city and state if in the U.S., or city and country as presently known.

fields.name: socialSecurityNumber
fields.label: Social Security number
fields.description: Item 5. If you have never been issued a Social Security number, enter all zeros and separately submit a signed, dated statement declaring under penalty of perjury that you have never been issued one; if you reside abroad, also state the foreign country of residence.

fields.name: otherNameUsed1
fields.label: List all other names you have used — name A
fields.description: Item 9: all legal names previously used, including maiden name, name changes, and previous married names. The form allows up to two other names (item A and item B); use a separate attached sheet for more.

fields.name: otherNameUsed2
fields.label: List all other names you have used — name B
fields.description: Item 9, second of the two other-name slots the form provides.

fields.name: mostRecentPassportBookNumber
fields.label: Most recent U.S. passport book number
fields.description: Leave blank if not applicable. Provide when reporting a book (see Section D item 1: submit the most recently issued U.S. passport book and/or card that carries the error).

fields.name: mostRecentPassportCardNumber
fields.label: Most recent U.S. passport card number
fields.description: Leave blank if not applicable.

fields.name: passportBookIssueDate
fields.label: Most recent U.S. passport book — issue date
fields.description: YYYY-MM-DD. Applicable when reporting a passport book.

fields.name: passportCardIssueDate
fields.label: Most recent U.S. passport card — issue date
fields.description: YYYY-MM-DD. Applicable when reporting a passport card.

fields.name: passportBookSize
fields.label: Passport book size requested
fields.description: Applicable only when the reapplication includes a passport book.
fields.sourceRef: Application Page 1, book/card size selection (AcroForm field only; no corresponding printed instruction, as with the analogous field in us/dos/passport-renewal-ds82)

fields.name: emailAddress
fields.label: Email
fields.description: Item 6. By providing an email address, the applicant approves email messages about passport status and travel information.

fields.name: primaryContactPhone
fields.label: Primary contact phone number
fields.description: Item 7. In international E.164 format, e.g. +12025551234. By providing this number, the applicant approves text/SMS messages about passport status and travel information.

fields.name: additionalContactPhone1
fields.label: Additional contact phone number A
fields.description: AcroForm field only; no corresponding printed instruction. The form provides two additional-contact-phone slots side by side on Application Page 2 (see additionalContactPhone2).

fields.name: additionalContactPhone2
fields.label: Additional contact phone number B
fields.description: AcroForm field only; second of the two additional-contact-phone slots.

fields.name: mailingAddressLine1
fields.label: Mailing address — Street/RFD #, P.O. Box, or URB
fields.description: Item 8, line 1.

fields.name: mailingAddressLine2
fields.label: Mailing address — line 2 ('In Care Of')
fields.description: Item 8, line 2: if the applicant does not live at the address given in line 1, the name of the person who lives there, marked 'In Care Of'. If the applicant is a minor child, this must be the parent or adult registered to receive mail at that address.

fields.name: mailingAddressCity
fields.label: Mailing address — city
fields.description: Item 8.

fields.name: mailingAddressState
fields.label: Mailing address — state
fields.description: Two-letter USPS state abbreviation.

fields.name: mailingAddressPostalCode
fields.label: Mailing address — ZIP code
fields.description: 5-digit or ZIP+4 U.S. format.

fields.name: mailingAddressCountry
fields.label: Mailing address — country (if outside the U.S.)
fields.description: AcroForm field only; no corresponding printed instruction (the form provides a country line, as with the analogous field in us/dos/passport-renewal-ds82).

fields.name: permanentAddressLine1
fields.label: Permanent address — street
fields.description: AcroForm field only; no corresponding printed instruction. A distinct address block from the mailing address, for when they differ (as with the analogous block in us/dos/passport-renewal-ds82).

fields.name: permanentAddressLine2
fields.label: Permanent address — apartment/unit
fields.description: AcroForm field only; no corresponding printed instruction.

fields.name: permanentAddressCity
fields.label: Permanent address — city
fields.description: AcroForm field only; no corresponding printed instruction.

fields.name: permanentAddressState
fields.label: Permanent address — state
fields.description: AcroForm field only; no corresponding printed instruction.

fields.name: permanentAddressPostalCode
fields.label: Permanent address — ZIP code
fields.description: AcroForm field only; no corresponding printed instruction.

fields.name: height
fields.label: Height
fields.description: AcroForm field only; no corresponding printed instruction (as with the analogous physical-description fields in us/dos/passport-renewal-ds82).

fields.name: hairColor
fields.label: Hair color
fields.description: AcroForm field only; no corresponding printed instruction.

fields.name: eyeColor
fields.label: Eye color
fields.description: AcroForm field only; no corresponding printed instruction.

fields.name: occupation
fields.label: Occupation
fields.description: AcroForm field only; no corresponding printed instruction.

fields.name: employerOrSchool
fields.label: Employer or school
fields.description: AcroForm field only; no corresponding printed instruction.

fields.name: emergencyContactName
fields.label: Emergency contact — name
fields.description: AcroForm field only; no corresponding printed instruction (as with the analogous emergency-contact block in us/dos/passport-renewal-ds82).

fields.name: emergencyContactAddressLine1
fields.label: Emergency contact — address
fields.description: AcroForm field only; no corresponding printed instruction.

fields.name: emergencyContactAddressLine2
fields.label: Emergency contact — apartment/unit
fields.description: AcroForm field only; no corresponding printed instruction.

fields.name: emergencyContactCity
fields.label: Emergency contact — city
fields.description: AcroForm field only; no corresponding printed instruction.

fields.name: emergencyContactState
fields.label: Emergency contact — state
fields.description: AcroForm field only; no corresponding printed instruction.

fields.name: emergencyContactZipCode
fields.label: Emergency contact — ZIP code
fields.description: AcroForm field only; no corresponding printed instruction.

fields.name: emergencyContactRelationship
fields.label: Emergency contact — relationship to applicant
fields.description: AcroForm field only; no corresponding printed instruction.

fields.name: emergencyContactPhone
fields.label: Emergency contact — phone
fields.description: AcroForm field only; no corresponding printed instruction. In international E.164 format.

fields.name: travelDepartureDate
fields.label: Travel departure date
fields.description: AcroForm field only; no corresponding printed instruction (as with the analogous travel-plans block in us/dos/passport-renewal-ds82). Only relevant if travel is imminent.

fields.name: travelReturnDate
fields.label: Travel return date
fields.description: AcroForm field only; no corresponding printed instruction.

fields.name: countriesToBeVisited
fields.label: Countries to be visited
fields.description: AcroForm field only; no corresponding printed instruction.

fields.name: changedNameLast
fields.label: New name (after marriage/court order) — Last
fields.description: Item 21: complete this section with the applicant's new name when nameChangedWithinOneYear is true and the submitted passport book and/or card is less than one year old. Must be accompanied by an official certified name-change document (certified copy of a marriage certificate, divorce decree, or court order) showing a seal and officiant's/judge's signature.

fields.name: changedNameFirst
fields.label: New name (after marriage/court order) — First
fields.description: Item 21.

fields.name: changedNameMiddle
fields.label: New name (after marriage/court order) — Middle
fields.description: Item 21.

fields.name: misprintedLastName
fields.label: Last name needs correction
fields.description: Item 22: when identifyingInfoPrintedIncorrectly is true, check only the box(es) next to the field(s) that need to be corrected and complete the information as it should appear (see correctedLastName).

fields.name: misprintedFirstName
fields.label: First name needs correction
fields.description: Item 22 (see misprintedLastName).

fields.name: misprintedMiddleName
fields.label: Middle name needs correction
fields.description: Item 22 (see misprintedLastName).

fields.name: misprintedDateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of birth needs correction
fields.description: Item 22 (see misprintedLastName).

fields.name: misprintedPlaceOfBirth
fields.label: Place of birth needs correction
fields.description: Item 22 (see misprintedLastName).

fields.name: misprintedSexMarker
fields.label: Sex marker needs correction
fields.description: Item 22 (see misprintedLastName).

fields.name: correctedLastName
fields.label: Corrected last name
fields.description: The correct value, required when misprintedLastName is true. Must be accompanied by evidence showing the correct information (e.g. certified birth certificate or certified marriage certificate).

fields.name: correctedFirstName
fields.label: Corrected first name
fields.description: The correct value, required when misprintedFirstName is true.

fields.name: correctedMiddleName
fields.label: Corrected middle name
fields.description: The correct value, required when misprintedMiddleName is true.

fields.name: correctedDateOfBirth
fields.label: Corrected date of birth
fields.description: The correct value, required when misprintedDateOfBirth is true. YYYY-MM-DD.

fields.name: correctedPlaceOfBirth
fields.label: Corrected place of birth
fields.description: The correct value, required when misprintedPlaceOfBirth is true.

fields.name: correctedSexMarker
fields.label: Corrected sex marker
fields.description: The correct value, required when misprintedSexMarker is true.
fields.sourceRef: Application Page 2, correction block ('Corect Gender' widget)

fields.name: actsOrConditionsDeclarationConfirmed
fields.label: Declaration confirmed
fields.description: By signing, the applicant declares under penalty of perjury: (1) they are a U.S. citizen or non-citizen national and have not performed any of the acts or conditions listed on Instruction Page 4 (unless an explanatory statement is attached) — namely, not currently required to register as a sex offender for an offense against a minor, not convicted of a federal or state drug offense or a statutory 'sex tourism' crime, and not the subject of an outstanding warrant, court order forbidding departure, or federal grand jury subpoena; (2) the statements on the application are true and correct; (3) no false statements or documents have knowingly and willfully been included; (4) the submitted photograph is a genuine, current photograph of the applicant; and (5) they have read and understood the warning on Instruction Page 4.
fields.sourceRef: Instruction Page 4, 'Acts or Conditions' / Application Page 1 signature block

steps.title: Your most recent passport, and name change (if applicable)
